overview.description: The iShares International Treasury Bond ETF (IGOV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of developed market, non-US government issued debts with minimum maturities of one year. IGOV was launched on Jan 21, 2009 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: FTSE World Government Bond Index  Developed Markets Capped Select Index

data.title: 10 Tantalizing International ETFs to Buy
data.text: China poses a risk to those broadening their portfolios beyond the U.S. These international ETFs let you play global markets without exposure to the mainland.
